products.label: IBM DevOps Loop on IKS
products.name: deploy-arch-ibm-devops-loop-iks
products.short_description: Deploy IBM DevOps Loop — a unified Plan-Code-Build-Test-Release-Deploy-Measure SDLC platform — on IBM Cloud Kubernetes Service.
products.long_description:
This deployable architecture provisions a production-ready [IBM DevOps Loop](https://www.ibm.com/docs/en/devops-loop) environment on IBM Cloud Kubernetes Service (IKS). It automates every layer of the installation: optional VPC and IKS cluster provisioning, [Emissary-ingress](https://www.getambassador.io/) (Ambassador Edge Stack) API gateway, HCL Harbor registry authentication, TLS secret management, and the full DevOps Loop Helm chart deployment.

DevOps Loop unifies all eight phases of the software delivery lifecycle — **Plan**, **Code**, **Control**, **Build**, **Test**, **Release**, **Deploy**, and **Measure** — into a single platform, accelerated by the **Loop Genie** AI assistant built on IBM watsonx.

You can access the [source code and documentation](https://github.com/YOUR_ORG/devops-loop-iks-da) and use it to extend your current architecture or create new solutions using these building blocks.

features.title: End-to-End SDLC Automation
features.description: Covers all eight DevOps phases in a single platform: Plan, Code, Control, Build, Test, Release, Deploy, and Measure.

features.title: Optional Infrastructure Provisioning
features.description: Creates a VPC and IKS cluster automatically, or deploys into your existing IBM Cloud infrastructure with no changes required.

features.title: Emissary-ingress API Gateway
features.description: Configures Ambassador Edge Stack as the mandatory ingress controller, exposing HTTPS, WebSocket, and SSH ports required by DevOps Loop.

features.title: Selective Capability Enablement
features.description: Each of the eight DevOps Loop capabilities can be independently toggled on or off to match your team's requirements and license.

features.title: Loop Genie AI Integration
features.description: Integrates with IBM watsonx to power Loop Genie, an AI assistant providing cross-application search and workflow acceleration.

features.title: Dual Storage Classes
features.description: Provisions both ReadWriteOnce (IBM Block Storage Gold) and ReadWriteMany (IBM File Storage Gold) volumes for stateful workloads and shared data.

features.title: Secure by Default
features.description: Uses trusted CA TLS certificates, image-pull secrets for HCL Harbor, and Kubernetes RBAC for namespace isolation.

features.title: Composable and Extensible Architecture
features.description: Built on reusable Terraform IBM Modules that follow IBM Cloud recommended practices. Deploy as-is or adapt the underlying modules to fit your specific environment. Explore the [source code](https://github.com/YOUR_ORG/devops-loop-iks-da) to extend or create new solutions.

flavors.label: Self-Managed
flavors.name: self-managed
flavors.short_description: Deploy DevOps Loop on IKS with optional VPC and cluster provisioning. Suitable for teams who want full control over their infrastructure.

iam_permissions.notes: Required to create and manage the IKS cluster and deploy Kubernetes resources.
Required to create and manage the Virtual Private Cloud and subnet.
Required to create the API key used by the IKS cluster.
Required to create and manage IBM Cloud resource instances.

features.title: Minimal Inputs Required
features.description: Provide your API key, region, domain, HCL Harbor credentials, and TLS certificate — the automation handles everything else.

features.title: Production-Ready IKS Cluster
features.description: Provisions a 3-node IKS cluster using bx2.8x32 worker nodes (8 vCPU / 32 GB RAM each), sized for full DevOps Loop workloads.

features.title: Brownfield Support
features.description: Skip VPC or cluster creation entirely by providing IDs for existing resources — deploy only the Kubernetes workloads.

features.title: Fully Automated Helm Stack
features.description: Installs Emissary-ingress CRDs, the ingress controller, image-pull secrets, TLS secrets, and the DevOps Loop Helm chart in the correct order.

features.title: IBM Cloud Native
features.description: Uses IBM Block Storage Gold (RWO) and IBM File Storage Gold (RWX), IKS Ingress Domains, and IBM Cloud IAM throughout.

diagram.caption: DevOps Loop on IKS — Self-Managed architecture showing VPC, IKS cluster, Emissary-ingress, and all eight DevOps Loop capability pods.

diagrams.description:
This architecture provisions a complete IBM DevOps Loop environment on IBM Cloud Kubernetes Service.

- **VPC and IKS Cluster**: A single-zone VPC with a /24 subnet hosts a 3-node IKS cluster (bx2.8x32). Cluster creation is optional — an existing cluster ID can be supplied instead.
- **Emissary-ingress**: Ambassador Edge Stack serves as the mandatory API gateway, exposing ports 80 (HTTP), 443 (HTTPS), 7919 (Deploy WebSocket), 7920 (Build WebSocket), and 9022 (Control SSH) via an IBM Cloud Network Load Balancer.
- **DevOps Loop Capabilities**: Up to eight pods — Plan, Code, Control, Build, Test, Release, Deploy, and Measure — run in the `devops-loop` namespace alongside the Loop Genie AI assistant.
- **Storage**: IBM Block Storage Gold (RWO) for stateful databases and IBM File Storage Gold GID (RWX) for shared volumes.
- **Registry and TLS**: An image-pull secret authenticates to HCL Harbor (hclcr.io) and a Kubernetes TLS secret stores the trusted CA certificate for the custom domain.

value_constraints.description: prefix must begin with a lowercase letter and may contain only lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens '-'. It must not end with a hyphen('-'), and cannot contain consecutive hyphens ('--'). It should not exceed 16 characters.

configuration.description: The IBM Cloud region where all resources will be deployed. [Learn More](https://terraform-ibm-modules.github.io/documentation/#/region).
